text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fine Motion dominates at the Mile Championship!
Although vexed by her loss, Kawakami Princess
congratulates her rival.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thunderous applause and cheers of support echo
throughout the venue. There's no way anyone's
going to forget the dazzling victor of the princess
showdown!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With this incredible race behind us, Fine Motion
and I happily wonder what to do tomorrow. There
are only a few months left before she goes back
to Ireland... which means there's still time to enjoy
Japan!
